description: Declarative architecture health budget. ArchGuard reads this to calibrate thresholds.

exclusions.reason: test files exempted from size limits
test files exempted from size limits

complexity.note: AST-based complexity deferred to 0.59.0+; 0.58.0 uses line-based proxy

governance_data_size.note: FIX-160: governance data volume threshold. Warn at 200KB, error at 250KB (below the 256KB agent single-read limit so the warning fires before the file becomes unreadable). Drives check-governance-data-size.

gate_integration.note: 0.58.0 first release: WARN/ERROR are advisory, do not block release gate. Future versions may enable fatal.
